name: openspec-implement
description: Implement an OpenSpec change end-to-end: apply tasks, run build/test, multi-angle multi-model review panel, arbiter gate with self-healing rework.

verify.description: Shell command for the build/test gate. Non-zero exit fails the phase. Default suits pi-ext; override per project, e.g. verify='npx tsc --noEmit && npm test'.

phases.task:
Implement OpenSpec change `{args.change}`.

Apply-phase state (context files + pending tasks + progress) as JSON:
{steps.load.output}

Rules:
- Read the proposal, design, spec deltas, and tasks (some are pre-loaded above; read the delta specs under openspec/changes/{args.change}/specs/ yourself).
- Work through the PENDING tasks in openspec/changes/{args.change}/tasks.md in order. Keep each change minimal and scoped to its task.
- Immediately after finishing a task, flip its checkbox `- [ ]` -> `- [x]` in tasks.md.
- If the spec has a genuine gap or contradiction, DO NOT silently invent behavior — stop and report the blocker in your output. Do not weaken or delete tests to make them pass.
- Do not run tests yourself; the next phase does that.

run: git status --short && echo '---' && git diff HEAD | head -c 60000

phases.task:
Spec-compliance review of OpenSpec change `{args.change}`.

Working-tree diff (untracked files appear only in the status list — read those files yourself):
{steps.diff.output}

For EVERY requirement and scenario in the delta specs under openspec/changes/{args.change}/specs/, verify there is implementation evidence (cite file:line). Also check every task in tasks.md is genuinely done, not just checked off.

Output a numbered list of findings, each tagged [blocker], [major], or [minor]. If fully compliant, output exactly: No findings.

KISS/YAGNI/DRY review of this change.

Working-tree diff (untracked files appear only in the status list — read those files yourself):
{steps.diff.output}

Hunt for: over-engineering, needless abstractions or indirection, dead code, duplicated logic that existing code already provides, and scope creep beyond what the spec in openspec/changes/{args.change}/ asks for.

Output a numbered list of findings, each tagged [blocker], [major], or [minor]. If clean, output exactly: No findings.

Security review of this change.

Working-tree diff (untracked files appear only in the status list — read those files yourself):
{steps.diff.output}

Hunt for: command/shell injection, unsafe eval/exec, path traversal, secret or credential leaks, missing input validation, unsafe defaults, and data exposure.

Output a numbered list of findings, each tagged [blocker], [major], or [minor]. If clean, output exactly: No findings.
